title: Christmas Santa Plate - Wooden Circular Pad, Santa Plate Xmas Eve Set for Holiday Dining, for Family & Friends Christmas Table Decor
features: 【Premium Wooden Material for Safety & Durability】Crafted from high-quality natural wood, this Christmas Santa Plate is non-toxic, odor-free, and safe for direct food contact—ideal for holding candies, cookies, or small meals during Christmas. The sturdy wood resists scratches and deformation, ensuring long-term use, while its smooth surface protects your dining table from heat, spills, or scratches.

【Festive Santa-Themed Design for Holiday Vibe】Featuring a classic Santa Claus illustration paired with subtle Christmas elements, this Christmas Plate instantly boosts your holiday decor. Vibrant red and green accents match traditional Christmas aesthetics, making it a eye-catching piece for Christmas Eve dinners, family gatherings, or holiday parties—perfect for adding cheer to any table.

【Versatile for All Christmas Occasions】Designed for unisex use, this Santa Plate Christmas Eve Set works for kids (leaving treats for Santa) and adults (serving snacks or decor). It’s great for Christmas Eve meals, holiday parties, table centerpieces, or gifting to family/friends—no matter the scenario, it fits seamlessly into your festive plans.

【Perfect Size & Practical Functionality】With a circular diameter of 20cm (7.87in) and thickness of 0.5cm (0.2in), this Christmas Plate Pad fits most standard plates, bowls, or mugs. Lightweight (approx. 80g) for easy handling, it keeps your table clean from crumbs/stains while staying unobtrusive—functional and decorative in one.
【Charming Christmas Design】Features festive illustrations of reindeer and Santa, making it a delightful addition to your Christmas decorations.
description: Specification: Material: Made from high-quality natural wood (pine/birch), this plate is non-toxic, BPA-free, and safe for food contact. Exact Size & Weight Details Shape: Circular (timeless for table decor) Diameter: 20cm (7.87in) – fits most standard dinner plates, bowls, or mugs Thickness: 0.5cm (0.2in) – thin enough to avoid bulk, thick enough to protect tables Net Weight: ~80g – lightweight for easy carrying/storage, no strain on your table. Festive Pattern & Color Scheme It uses traditional holiday colors: red (for Santa’s suit) and green (for holly), which matches classic, rustic, or modern Christmas decor. Whether used for serving or display, it instantly brightens your space. Care & Safety Notes Do not soak in water or use a dishwasher: Clean with a soft, damp cloth and dry immediately to prevent wood warping. Avoid high heat (e.g., stovetops, hot ovens) to protect the wood’s structure. Store in a cool, dry place when not in use—keep away from moisture to maintain quality.
